bindings.rule: Backend Forge routing must distinguish fast, autonomous, architecture leadership, migrations, auth, and bug-fix tasks.
positive_cases: route golden cases pass for common backend task modes
negative_cases: unexpected mode or policy fails route_golden_tests.py

bindings.rule: Backend implementation writes require confirmed goal, architecture, data impact, security boundary, test closure, frozen work unit, and confirmed change contract.

needles: gate_check allowed implementation write without session

positive_cases: confirmed S4 implementation write passes gate_check.py
negative_cases: implementation write without session is blocked

bindings.rule: Backend Forge visible workflow output must use the [backend-forge] prefix and include completion when required.
